authors: Salla Tuomola Jaana Hujanen Katja Lehtisaari Juho Ruotsalainen Mikko Grönlund
raw_title: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_en: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
title_zh: At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices
plain_summary_en: This paper studies At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19), Confusion, 2019-20 coronavirus outbreak, Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2). The abstract suggests a review approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
plain_summary_zh: This paper studies At the Crossroads of Fear, Confusion and Hope. COVID-19 News as the Motivator of Affective News Usage and Sense-Making Practices. In plain terms, it asks what is happening, why it matters for public communication, and what evidence the authors use. The likely focus is Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19), Confusion, 2019-20 coronavirus outbreak, Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2). The abstract suggests a review approach, which makes the work useful for understanding how communication changes in everyday life.
research_direction_en: The paper points to an active research direction around Coronavirus disease 2019 (COVID-19), Confusion, 2019-20 coronavirus outbreak, Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), especially how institutions, platforms, and audiences shape communication outcomes.
